_id.description: Unique identifier for the movie (TMDB ID)

originalTitle.description: The title of the movie in its original language

title.description: The localized or translated title of the movie

posterPath.description: Relative URL path to the movie poster image

overview.description: A brief plot summary or description of the movie

popularity.description: Popularity score generated by the external API

voteCount.description: Total number of votes received from the external API

voteAverage.description: Average rating score from the external API

originalLanguage.description: ISO 639-1 code for the original language

totalVotosTC.description: Total number of internal platform user votes

votosMediaTC.description: Average rating based on internal platform users

premios.description: Embedded list of accolades and awards (1:N Denormalized Relation)

premioId.description: Reference ID to the specific award ceremony

titulo.description: Name of the ceremony (e.g., Oscars, Goya, Cannes)

categoriaId.description: Reference ID to the specific award category

categoria.description: Name of the winning category (e.g., Best Picture)

anyo.description: The year the award was granted
